name: action-payload-schema-violation
description: A `data:submit` action naming a DECLARED action whose `data` violates the entry's declared payload schema is rejected at receipt: the server replies an `error` frame with code CONTRACT_VIOLATION (echoing the action's requestId) and the envelope is NOT appended to the consume buffer. Proves the payload-schema half of the declared-action contract (SPEC Section 4.6 receipt validation) — name-membership alone does not admit an action whose payload breaks the contract.
